summary: Frontend-only testing for navbar color fix and i18n translation implementation. All features tested and working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All i18n translations working correctly for English, Arabic, Chinese, and Spanish across all pages (Home, About, Services, Contact, Credibility). Navbar background is light gray #d9d9d9 with dark text. Language persistence works when navigating between pages.

navbar_color_test.details: Navbar background color confirmed as rgb(217, 217, 217) matching #d9d9d9. Has bg-[#d9d9d9] CSS class. Navigation link text is dark (text-primary).

language_switcher_test.details: Language switcher dropdown shows all 4 languages: English, Arabic (العربية), Chinese (中文), Spanish (Español)

english_navigation_test.details: English nav links: Home, About, Services, Portfolio, Insights, Contact

arabic_translation_test.details: Arabic nav links correctly translate to: الرئيسية, عن, خدمات, محفظة, رؤى, اتصل. Translation persists across page navigation.

chinese_translation_test.details: Chinese nav links correctly translate to: 首页, 关于, 服务, 作品集, 见解, 联系. Hero content translates correctly.

spanish_translation_test.details: Spanish nav links correctly translate to: Inicio, Acerca de, Servicios, Portafolio, Perspectivas, Contacto. All page content translates correctly.

about_page_translation.details: About page content translates fully in Arabic - label, title, and all section content.

services_page_translation.details: Services page content translates fully in Spanish - Nuestros Servicios, Marco de Asesoría Integrada, all service cards.

contact_page_translation.details: Contact page form labels and headings translate correctly - Contáctenos, Programe una Consulta Estratégica, Solicitar Consulta, Nombre, Correo.

credibility_page_translation.details: Credibility page content translates in Arabic - المحفظة والخبرة, خبرة مثبتة عبر الحدود.

footer_translation.details: Footer text translates correctly - روابط سريعة (Quick Links), اتصل (Contact), tagline in Arabic.

translation_persistence.details: Language selection persists when navigating between pages. Verified Arabic, Chinese, and Spanish persistence.
